title: Eriosoriopsis cycloloba
taxonomy: Eriosoriopsis cycloloba is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Eriosoriopsis and is part of the kingdom Plantae. Within the kingdom Plantae, it is further classified as a vascular plant and a member of the division Pteridophyta. This classification indicates that Eriosoriopsis cycloloba is a type of fern with unique characteristics and features. The classification of this plant is still being studied and refined by botanists and scientists.
